name: Bibra Lake
distanceNote: our home suburb, right where our workshop is
metaTitle: Metal Fabrication Bibra Lake | Offer Fabrications
metaDescription: Offer Fabrications is a Bibra Lake metal fabrication workshop building custom steel, stainless and aluminium for local businesses, ready to collect or deliver.
intro: Bibra Lake is our home. Offer Fabrications runs its workshop at Unit 14/16 Salpietro Street, in the heart of the Bibra Lake industrial estate, one of the busiest light-to-medium industrial precincts in Perth's south. Businesses here can deal with us directly and collect finished work straight from the floor.
localContext: For neighbouring Bibra Lake trades and manufacturers we regularly build custom steel frames, stainless benches and enclosures, aluminium brackets and low-volume production runs, all fabricated a few doors down from where they are needed.

name: Henderson
distanceNote: about 15 minutes south of our Bibra Lake workshop
metaTitle: Metal Fabrication Henderson | Marine Steel | Offer Fabrications
metaDescription: Steel, stainless and aluminium fabrication for Henderson and the Australian Marine Complex, built in our Bibra Lake workshop and delivered to you.
intro: Henderson is home to the Australian Marine Complex, Western Australia's shipbuilding, defence and marine sustainment precinct, where firms like Austal, BAE Systems and Civmec build and maintain vessels for the Royal Australian Navy. Offer Fabrications supports this precinct from our Bibra Lake workshop, fabricating steel, stainless and aluminium components and delivering them into Henderson.
localContext: We typically fabricate marine-grade stainless and aluminium parts, structural steel sections and welded assemblies for the fabrication and support businesses clustered around the AMC, then arrange transport the short distance south to Henderson.

name: Kwinana
distanceNote: about 20 minutes south of our Bibra Lake workshop
metaDescription: Custom and structural steel fabrication for Kwinana's heavy industry, welded in our Bibra Lake workshop and delivered to the Kwinana Industrial Area.
intro: Kwinana anchors Perth's heavy industry, with refineries, chemical plants, cement works and mineral processing spread across the Kwinana Industrial Area on the Western Trade Coast. Offer Fabrications produces custom and structural steelwork in its Bibra Lake workshop and delivers to Kwinana operators who need robust, well-welded fabrication.
localContext: For Kwinana's resources and processing sites we fabricate heavy structural steel, platforms, brackets and stainless components to spec, welded with MIG and TIG and freighted down to the industrial area.

name: Naval Base
distanceNote: about 18 minutes south of our Bibra Lake workshop
metaTitle: Metal Fabrication Naval Base | Offer Fabrications
metaDescription: Structural steel, stainless and aluminium fabrication for Naval Base industry, built in our Bibra Lake workshop and delivered along Cockburn Sound.
intro: Naval Base sits within the City of Kwinana and carries a heavy concentration of industry along Cockburn Sound, from Alcoa's alumina refinery to a run of engineering and maintenance yards. Offer Fabrications fabricates the steel, stainless and aluminium these operations rely on and delivers it into Naval Base from our Bibra Lake floor.
localContext: Work we commonly turn out for Naval Base sites includes structural steel, walkways, frames and stainless fittings, CNC cut and folded, then transported the short distance south.

name: Cockburn
distanceNote: just a few minutes from our Bibra Lake workshop
metaDescription: Metal fabrication for Cockburn businesses in custom steel, stainless and aluminium, built minutes away in our Bibra Lake workshop and delivered fast.
intro: Cockburn is our closest neighbour, taking in Cockburn Central and the industrial pockets that ring Bibra Lake. Being just minutes from our workshop, Cockburn businesses get quick turnaround on fabrication without the parts ever travelling far. We build in Bibra Lake and deliver across the City of Cockburn.
localContext: For Cockburn trades, builders and manufacturers we produce custom steel frames, stainless benches, aluminium fittings and short production runs, ready to collect or drop close by.

name: Jandakot
distanceNote: about 10 minutes from our Bibra Lake workshop
metaDescription: Custom steel, stainless and aluminium fabrication for Jandakot City and airport businesses, built in our nearby Bibra Lake workshop and delivered.
intro: Jandakot pairs a busy general-aviation airport with the growing Jandakot City industrial estate, home to logistics, trade and light-manufacturing tenants. Offer Fabrications supplies these businesses from its Bibra Lake workshop just up the road, fabricating to order and delivering into Jandakot.
localContext: Around Jandakot we regularly build steel racking and frames, aluminium and stainless fittings, brackets and machine guarding, CNC cut and folded then delivered a short drive east.

name: Canning Vale

metaDescription: Steel and stainless fabrication for Canning Vale warehouses and manufacturers, made to order in our Bibra Lake workshop and delivered to the estate.

Offer Fabrications fabricates custom and stainless steelwork for these operations in Bibra Lake and delivers it to Canning Vale.
localContext: For Canning Vale warehouses and manufacturers we build stainless benches and trolleys, steel mezzanine and racking components, guarding and general fabrication, made to measure and freighted across.
